_note: Curated Open5e reskins for horror. Dread-first renames over real stat blocks; cr denormalized and verified by scripts/test-bestiary.mjs.

entries.name: Wall Rat
entries.blurb: too many of them, and they watch

entries.name: Smiling Neighbor
entries.blurb: ordinary face, wrong eyes

entries.name: Road Vulture
entries.blurb: strips travelers the storm leaves behind

entries.name: Attic Leech
entries.blurb: soft wet wings in the dark above

entries.name: Bed Serpent
entries.blurb: found where it cannot possibly be

entries.name: The Returned
entries.blurb: buried Sunday, knocking Thursday

entries.name: Cellar Bones
entries.blurb: the house's previous owners

entries.name: Treeline Watcher
entries.blurb: keeps exactly to the edge of the light

entries.name: The Skittering
entries.blurb: the walls empty out at once

entries.name: Basement Bloom
entries.blurb: it was smaller yesterday

entries.name: Chapel Warden
entries.blurb: tends a congregation that never leaves

entries.name: The Long Dark
entries.blurb: your shadow, one step out of sync

entries.name: Quarry Man
entries.blurb: broad, silent, always nearby

entries.name: Drain Sludge
entries.blurb: what the pipes have been digesting

entries.name: Lock-Eater
entries.blurb: doors stop locking when it is near

entries.name: Ceiling Smother
entries.blurb: the light goes out and then the air

entries.name: Graveyard Regular
entries.blurb: visits fresh plots, never brings flowers

entries.name: Cold Spot
entries.blurb: the room remembers what happened in it

entries.name: Nursery Whisperer
entries.blurb: small, giggling, invisible to parents

entries.name: Contract Familiar
entries.blurb: someone in town made a deal

entries.name: Loft Weaver
entries.blurb: the cocoons in the barn are person-sized

entries.name: The Standing Suit
entries.blurb: faces the door now; it faced the wall before

entries.name: The Crying Woman
entries.blurb: her weeping leads to the cliff path

entries.name: Two-Headed Stray
entries.blurb: its bite goes bad, then worse

entries.name: The Thing in the Well
entries.blurb: the smell arrives before it does

entries.name: Revival Preacher
entries.blurb: his tent leaves emptied towns behind

entries.name: The Wrong Door
entries.blurb: the house has one more door than it should

entries.name: Marsh Light
entries.blurb: the drowned calling for company

entries.name: Church Roof Watcher
entries.blurb: the parish insists it has always been there

entries.name: The Landlord
entries.blurb: hears everything through the walls

entries.name: The Spreading Stain
entries.blurb: cutting it only makes more

entries.name: Parlor Rug
entries.blurb: guests are asked to please step around it

entries.name: The Washerwoman
entries.blurb: scrubs shrouds at the ford, knows your name

entries.name: The Previous Tenant
entries.blurb: wants everything put back where it was

entries.name: The Warden of the Yard
entries.blurb: keeps the graves full and counted

entries.name: Granny Underhill
entries.blurb: grants wishes with interest

entries.name: The Good Doctor
entries.blurb: locks himself in on full moons; last night he forgot

entries.name: The Museum Piece
entries.blurb: the sarcophagus lid keeps shifting

entries.name: Not-Quite-Him
entries.blurb: came back from the woods slightly wrong

entries.name: The Black Dog
entries.blurb: seeing it means a death; being seen means yours

entries.name: Between-Walls Thing
entries.blurb: the scratching moves through solid stone

entries.name: The Garden Keeper
entries.blurb: the statues are all mid-scream

entries.name: The Hedge Warden
entries.blurb: the maze rearranges to feed it

entries.name: The Steeple Beast
entries.blurb: quills in the church door every dawn

entries.name: The Brothers Grole
entries.blurb: one head begs you to run; do not trust it

entries.name: The Midnight Suitor
entries.blurb: courts the lonely; the lonely waste away

entries.name: The Cellar Dark
entries.blurb: the stairs go down farther than the house is deep

entries.name: The Lake Warden
entries.blurb: the fishermen leave it a share, always

entries.name: The Lady of the Manor
entries.blurb: her guests stay far longer than they planned

entries.name: The Bridge Keeper
entries.blurb: burned once; it remembers who

entries.name: The Night Caller
entries.blurb: asks politely to be let in, every night

entries.name: The Harvest Shade
entries.blurb: crops die in its footprints

entries.name: The Compost Heap
entries.blurb: the garden has been eating the gardeners

entries.name: The Dream Merchant
entries.blurb: you have met her; you just cannot remember where

entries.name: The Doctor's Son
entries.blurb: made from the town's dead, wearing familiar faces

entries.name: The Thing Below the Privy
entries.blurb: the town's secret disposal arrangement

entries.name: The Cave Mouth
entries.blurb: the stalactites are arranged like teeth

entries.name: The Veiled Widow
entries.blurb: mourners at her estate become monuments

entries.name: The House Guest
entries.blurb: doors open, floorboards creak, nothing there

entries.name: The Retired Occultist
entries.blurb: his library should not be read aloud

entries.name: The Spinner in the Belfry
entries.blurb: half woman, half spider, all patience

entries.name: The Butcher's Mistake
entries.blurb: stitched from the farm's missing animals

entries.name: The Collector of Children
entries.blurb: wears the schoolmaster's face by day

entries.name: The Orchard Terror
entries.blurb: something huge has been sleeping in the barn

entries.name: The Quiet Man
entries.blurb: checks into the inn the night before each death

entries.name: The Coat on the Hook
entries.blurb: wails from the hallway, then silence

entries.name: The Bog Mother
entries.blurb: the village offers it a name each winter

entries.name: The Returning Serpent
entries.blurb: killed thrice by the town founders; due again

entries.name: The Debt Collector
entries.blurb: someone's grandfather signed something

entries.name: The Hanging Tree
entries.blurb: walks the fields on moonless nights

entries.name: The Memory in the Reservoir
entries.blurb: the town drinks from it; the town dreams of it

entries.name: The Crypt's Keeper
entries.blurb: guards a door the church says is just a wall

entries.name: The Mine Serpent
entries.blurb: the deep shafts were sealed for a reason

entries.name: The Man Behind the Curtain
entries.blurb: the town's luck has an author

entries.name: The Old Family
entries.blurb: the manor on the hill never sells

entries.name: The First Founder
entries.blurb: the town charter is written in his skin

entries.name: The God Below
entries.blurb: the tremors follow a feeding schedule

entries.name: The Archivist
entries.blurb: every record of him ends mid-sentence
